name.description: Identifier for the plugin. Must consist of ASCII letters, digits, underscores, and hyphens, and must not start or end with an underscore or hyphen. Two plugins with the same name cannot be installed at the same time, so this should be globally unique. IDA Pro derives a namespaced identifier by converting all non-alphanumeric characters to underscores and prepending `__plugins__` (e.g. `my plugin` becomes `__plugins__my_plugin`).
name.title: Name

version.description: Plugin version in `x.y.z` semver format. Do not include a leading `v`.
version.title: Version

entryPoint.description: Filename of the plugin's main file, relative to this `ida-plugin.json`. If the value has no file extension, IDA assumes a native plugin and appends the host platform's dynamic shared object extension (`.dll`, `.so`, `.dylib`). For IDAPython plugins, this should be a `.py` file.
entryPoint.title: Entrypoint

description.description: One-line description of the plugin, shown as the headline of its page on the plugin repository and in lists of search results.
description.title: Description

categories.description: Major categories used to improve discoverability in the plugin repository.
categories.title: Categories

keywords.description: Search terms used to improve discoverability in the plugin repository.
keywords.title: Keywords

authors.description: Authors of the plugin. At least one author or maintainer is required.
authors.title: Authors

maintainers.description: Maintainers of the plugin. At least one author or maintainer is required.
maintainers.title: Maintainers

idaVersions.description: Versions of IDA Pro the plugin supports. Each version must be declared separately because IDA's APIs do not strictly follow semantic versioning. The default is all versions, but this is almost certainly incorrect.
idaVersions.title: Idaversions

platforms.description: Platforms the plugin supports. The default is all platforms, which is appropriate for cross-platform Python plugins. Native plugins should declare the platform consistent with the `.dll`/`.so`/`.dylib` file in the archive.
platforms.title: Platforms

logoPath.description: Relative path within the repository to an image representing the plugin on `plugins.hex-rays.com`. Recommended aspect ratio is 16:9.
logoPath.title: Logopath

pythonDependencies.description: List of pip-compatible dependency specifications, or the literal string `inline` to read PEP 723 metadata from the entry point.
pythonDependencies.title: Pythondependencies

settings.description: User-configurable settings exposed by the plugin.
settings.title: Settings

key.description: Unique code-level identifier for the setting.
key.title: Key

required.description: Whether the user must supply a value for this setting.
required.title: Required

default.description: Default value used when no other config provides one. Not written into `ida-config.json`; provided on-demand.
default.title: Default

examples: OpenAI API key acquired from https://platform.openai.com/api-keys
documentation.title: Documentation

validation_pattern.description: Regular expression used to validate candidate values. Only used for string types. Mutually exclusive with `choices`.
validation_pattern.title: Validation Pattern

choices.description: Acceptable string values. Only used for string types. Mutually exclusive with `validation_pattern`.
choices.title: Choices

prompt.description: Whether to prompt the user for this setting during installation. Set to false to use the default value without prompting.
prompt.title: Prompt

repository.description: URL of the GitHub repository containing the source code for the plugin.
repository.title: Repository

homepage.description: URL of a website describing the plugin, if different from the GitHub repo.
homepage.title: Homepage

$schema.description: Optional JSON Schema URL used by editors like VSCode for validation.
$schema.title: $Schema

IDAMetadataDescriptorVersion.description: Version of the IDA metadata descriptor schema. Must be `1`.
IDAMetadataDescriptorVersion.title: Idametadatadescriptorversion
